> 🚨 **Stop.** If this issue could allow access to patient data, account takeover, or other real exploitation, **do not file a public issue.**
>
> Please follow the responsible disclosure process in [`SECURITY.md`](../../SECURITY.md) and email **security@azri.ai**.

This template exists only for *non-sensitive* security hygiene topics (e.g. a documentation gap, a published advisory affecting a dependency we've already patched, a public best-practice suggestion).
